tasks.subject: Task 1: Drizzle ORM RC Warning Restoration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Restore the release-candidate warning in both database skills so users know Drizzle ORM v1 stable has not shipped.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md:49`
- Modify: `skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md:49`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `skills/nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md` callout contains "release candidate" and a link to drizzle.team
- [ ] `skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md` callout contains "release candidate" and a link to drizzle.team
- [ ] Both files retain the full casing API migration note

**Verify:** `grep "release candidate" skills/nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md` → two matching lines

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md", "skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep \"release candidate\" skills/nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["nextjs-add-database callout contains release candidate and drizzle.team link", "nestjs-add-database callout contains release candidate and drizzle.team link", "Both files retain casing API migration note"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Remove Version Pins from SKILL.md Files
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove two SSOT violations — Ruff's hardcoded Python 3.12 target in `fastapi-code-standards` and the PyJWT version floor in `fastapi-add-auth`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/fastapi-code-standards/SKILL.md:84`
- Modify: `skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md:19`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `fastapi-code-standards/SKILL.md` Ruff line says "target version configured in `ruff.toml`" — no "Python 3.12"
- [ ] `fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md` dependency line shows `PyJWT[crypto]` with no `>=` version floor

**Verify:**
```bash
grep "Python 3.12" skills/fastapi-code-standards/SKILL.md        # expect: no output
grep 'PyJWT\[crypto\]>=' skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md        # expect: no output
```

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/fastapi-code-standards/SKILL.md", "skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep \"Python 3.12\" skills/fastapi-code-standards/SKILL.md; grep 'PyJWT\\[crypto\\]>=' skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fastapi-code-standards Ruff line says ruff.toml, not Python 3.12", "fastapi-add-auth PyJWT dep has no version floor"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Full argon2id Migration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace bcrypt with argon2id as the actual implementation in both auth skills and update the fastapi code standard.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md` (line 20 dep, lines 118–138 security.py block, line 300 rules)
- Modify: `skills/nestjs-add-auth/SKILL.md` (lines 18–31 dep section, line 169 import, line 178 hash call, line 336 rules)
- Modify: `skills/fastapi-code-standards/SKILL.md:127` (auth standard)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No bcrypt references in any of the three files
- [ ] fastapi-add-auth dep shows argon2-cffi; security.py uses PasswordHasher; no 72-byte check
- [ ] nestjs-add-auth onlyBuiltDependencies=argon2; install uses argon2; @types/bcrypt removed; AuthService uses argon2.hash
- [ ] All three rules sections reference argon2id

**Verify:** `grep "bcrypt" skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md skills/nestjs-add-auth/SKILL.md skills/fastapi-code-standards/SKILL.md` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md", "skills/nestjs-add-auth/SKILL.md", "skills/fastapi-code-standards/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep \"bcrypt\" skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md skills/nestjs-add-auth/SKILL.md skills/fastapi-code-standards/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No bcrypt references in any of the three files", "fastapi-add-auth dep shows argon2-cffi; security.py uses PasswordHasher; no 72-byte check", "nestjs-add-auth onlyBuiltDependencies=argon2; install uses argon2; @types/bcrypt removed; AuthService uses argon2.hash", "All three rules sections reference argon2id"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Version Bump and CHANGELOG
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bump plugin version from `2.8.0` to `2.9.0` and add the Round 9 CHANGELOG entry.

**Files:**
- Modify: `.claude-plugin/plugin.json:3`
- Modify: `CHANGELOG.md` (insert new `[2.9.0]` entry before `[2.8.0]`)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `plugin.json` `"version"` field is `"2.9.0"`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` contains a `[2.9.0] — 2026-05-07` section with three Fixed and three Changed items
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` existing `[2.8.0]` entry is unchanged

**Verify:**
```bash
grep '"version"' .claude-plugin/plugin.json    # expect: "version": "2.9.0"
grep '\[2\.9\.0\]' CHANGELOG.md               # expect: one match
```

```json:metadata
{"files": [".claude-plugin/plugin.json", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep '\"version\"' .claude-plugin/plugin.json && grep '\\[2\\.9\\.0\\]' CHANGELOG.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["plugin.json version is 2.9.0", "CHANGELOG has [2.9.0] entry dated 2026-05-07 with three Fixed and three Changed items", "CHANGELOG [2.8.0] entry unchanged"]}
```
